home.heroSubheadline: ASE-certified, bilingual, family-owned. We show you the problem before we fix it.
home.servicesHeading: Everything Your Car Needs, Done Right
home.servicesBody: From routine oil changes to check engine mysteries, we handle it all — domestic and import, cars and trucks. No guesswork. No unnecessary repairs. Just honest work at fair prices.
home.aboutBody: Carlos Martinez opened this shop on East 7th Street in 2008 with one goal: be the mechanic he wished existed when he was a customer. Eighteen years later, that's still the whole business plan.
home.serviceAreaHeading: Serving East Austin and Surrounding Neighborhoods
home.serviceAreaBody: We're your neighborhood shop — right on East 7th Street. We serve drivers from East Austin, Mueller, Cherrywood, Plaza Saltillo, Holly, and the surrounding ZIP codes: 78702, 78721, 78722, 78741, 78723, 78724.
home.ctaHeading: Ready to Bring Your Car In?
home.ctaBody: Walk-ins welcome. Call ahead for bigger jobs and we'll make sure we're ready for you.

services.heroHeadline: Full-Service Auto Repair in East Austin
services.heroSubheadline: ASE-certified technicians, honest pricing, bilingual team. Walk-ins welcome for most services.

oilChange.name: Oil Change & Fluid Services
oilChange.description: Full synthetic, conventional, and high-mileage oil changes. Plus transmission fluid, coolant, brake fluid, and power steering fluid flushes.

brakeRepair.name: Brake Repair & Inspection
brakeRepair.tagline: Free inspection — we show you the wear before we quote
brakeRepair.description: Full brake system inspection, pad and rotor replacement, brake fluid flush, ABS diagnostics. Free inspection with any visit.

engineDiagnostics.name: Engine Diagnostics
engineDiagnostics.tagline: We diagnose before we repair — no guesswork
engineDiagnostics.description: Computer diagnostics for check engine lights, performance issues, and emissions testing. $89 fee waived when you repair with us.

acRepair.name: AC & Heating Repair
acRepair.tagline: Don't sweat a Texas summer — we've got you
acRepair.description: AC recharge, compressor repair, heater core replacement. Full climate system diagnostics for all makes and models.

tireServices.name: Tire Services
tireServices.tagline: We match or beat dealer pricing
tireServices.description: Tire rotation, balancing, flat repair, and new tire installation. All major brands. Walk-ins welcome.

transmission.name: Transmission Service
transmission.tagline: Manual and automatic — domestic and import
transmission.description: Transmission fluid change, filter replacement, diagnostics. We diagnose before we quote — no surprises.

about.story: Carlos Martinez moved to Austin from Monterrey, Mexico in 2001. He started working as a mechanic at a dealership, but always dreamed of running his own shop. In 2008, he opened Martinez Auto Repair in a small garage on East 7th Street. Today, the shop has grown to a full 4-bay facility with three technicians, but the philosophy hasn't changed: treat every car like it's your own, and treat every customer like family. Carlos still works on cars himself every day.
about.why1Detail: We've been your neighbors for nearly two decades. Our reputation is everything to us.
about.why2Detail: Not all mechanics are equal. ASE Master certification is the highest level in the trade.
about.why3Detail: English and Spanish — equally. No second-class service, no awkward translations.
about.why4Detail: We never recommend a repair we haven't diagnosed. We show you the problem; you make the call.
about.why5Detail: We know you need your car. We work efficiently and keep you moving.
about.ctaBody: Walk-ins welcome on East 7th Street. Call ahead for bigger jobs.

contact.pageSubheading: Walk-ins welcome. Call ahead for larger jobs — we'll make sure we're ready for you.
contact.intro: We're easy to find on East 7th Street in East Austin. Call us, send a message, or just stop by. We'll be straight with you about what your car needs and how long it'll take.
contact.successMessage: Got it — we'll be in touch soon.
contact.errorMessage: Something went wrong. Give us a call instead.
contact.hoursNote: Hours subject to change on holidays. Call ahead to confirm.

blog.pageHeading: Car Tips From Your East Austin Mechanic
blog.pageSubheading: Practical advice — no fluff, no upsell. Just what you actually need to know about your car.

footer.tagline: Family-owned auto repair in East Austin since 2008. Honest work, fair prices, bilingual service.
